title: sql function iterates instead of bulk processing
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, value Float64, description String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, description) VALUES (1, 1.5, 'first'), (2, 2.5, 'second'), (3, NULL, 'third'), (4, 4.5, 'fourth');
CREATE TABLE another_table (ref_id Int32, amount Float32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY ref_id;
INSERT INTO another_table (ref_id, amount) SELECT id, value * 2 FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_table WHERE description LIKE 'f%';
key_bug_features: SQL function iterates instead of processing in bulk
